scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ruflo/contracts && npm run build -w @ruflo/config && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @ruflo/database && npm run build -w @ruflo/domain && npm run build -w @ruflo/sql && npm run build -w @ruflo/ui
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @ruflo/api && npm run build -w @ruflo/worker && npm run build -w @ruflo/ai-worker && npm run build -w @ruflo/web && npm run build -w @ruflo/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/config && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/database && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/sql && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/ui && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/api && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/worker && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/ai-worker && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/web && npm run typecheck -w @ruflo/admin
scripts.rollout:prod: npm run compose:build && docker compose up -d keycloak api web admin worker ai-worker
scripts.local:build: docker compose --env-file .env.local.example -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml build node-prod-base keycloak
scripts.local:rebuild:admin: docker compose --env-file .env.local.example -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml stop admin && docker compose --env-file .env.local.example -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml rm -f admin && docker compose --env-file .env.local.example -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml build --no-cache admin && docker compose --env-file .env.local.example -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d admin
